stages.name: Bootstrap · from zero to usable
stages.goal: empty repo → one provider + one model + passing hello-world chat

stages.name: Self-build an employee (chat only)
stages.goal: in /chat, Lead creates an employee; /employees list reflects it
stages.preconditions: employee meta tool + render EmployeeCard component

stages.name: Self-dispatch a task (fire-and-forget)
stages.goal: /chat → Lead assigns task → /tasks running → artifact produced

stages.name: Install a skill for an employee (chat only)
Install an MCP server + real invocation
stages.goal: Lead installs filesystem MCP → employee uses it
stages.preconditions: MCP spec delivered + real MCP fixture

stages.name: Build a trigger + wait for auto-fire
stages.goal: Lead defines daily trigger → manual fire_now → run + artifact visible

stages.name: Observability · fail & recover
stages.goal: break a model key → run task → UI guides to Gateway to fix → re-run green

north_star_dims.N1: Tool-First redemption: CRUD only via chat
north_star_dims.N2: One-screen decision: parent + key child visible together
north_star_dims.N3: Test is end-to-end: test button exercises the real thing
north_star_dims.N5: Test parity: test UI == production UI
north_star_dims.N6: Recoverable failure: empty/error states guide next step
